## Definition of Done

- [ ] TypeScript strict — no `any`
- [ ] Matches Figma; uses tokens, no hardcoded colors/sizes/spacing
- [ ] Storybook story covers all variants/states (components)
- [ ] Behavior test (Vitest + RTL) — asserts behavior, not implementation
- [ ] a11y: jest-axe passes + keyboard operable + visible focus (AA)
- [ ] `lint`, `typecheck`, `test`, `build` green locally
- [ ] No secret committed

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything assumed, deferred, or risky the reviewer should focus on. -->
